taskContext: Task 11.1 - Experience and Leveling System Implementation
rationale: Complexity 4/10 - straightforward implementation following established patterns. No team consultation needed.

implementation.approach: Create ProgressionService with experience and leveling mechanics
components: Experience accumulation with automatic level ups
Stat increases and derived stat recalculation
Experience reward calculation with level difference adjustment
implementation.testStrategy: Comprehensive unit tests covering all methods and edge cases

features: addExperience() - accumulates exp and triggers level ups
calculateStatIncreases() - +1 to all base stats per level

outcome.actualResult: ProgressionService implemented with 100% test coverage, all tests passing
lessonsLearned: Unused variables in tests cause compilation failures - remove them
Exponential formulas need careful testing for edge cases
Multiple level ups require proper experience overflow handling
Derived stats must be recalculated after base stat changes

nextSteps: Add experience rewards to monster kills
